calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-13-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Continued To Aug-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elaine Ercolini for Ruzena Kovacic.

Ms. Ercolini stated that this is an odd case, that the assets are college board 529 plans, that the college required that they open probate, that accounts have been opened, but the account records show the estate as the owner and that she will file a petition to close the estate. Status on close of estate is continued to August 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Ercolini is to file an inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
